[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows a person with their mouth open wide as if laughing or speaking, with part of a decorative wooden structure in the background.

Main Subject:
The main subject is a person captured in an extreme close-up, filling most of the left side of the image. Their eyes are looking downward, with the mouth open wide and the tongue visible, and teeth visible inside the open mouth. The person has a shaved or very closely cropped head and a gray short-sleeve shirt. A small gray object is visible near the right side of their neck or collar area.

Setting:
The background is indoors, with a light-colored wall and a curved, decorative wooden structure or frame visible on the right side. The lighting appears bright and even, suggesting indoor ambient light.

Visual Details:
The image is tightly framed and slightly tilted, with the person’s face dominating the composition. Colors include warm skin tones, a gray shirt, and golden-brown wood in the background. The person’s facial features are sharply visible due to the close distance, and the open-mouth pose shows a pink tongue and teeth.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a person with their mouth open wide and tongue out. The indoor background includes a light wall and a curved decorative wooden element.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text:** None detected (image appears to contain only a photo; no visible UI/text elements).

# Notes

- The screenshot contains no clearly readable words, numbers, or UI labels.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
